title: Promotion Gate Report
description: Machine-readable promotion decision artifact for the frozen Frontend/Product Engineer curriculum. Produced by runner_bridge.promotion_gates.build_promotion_report(). Each gate verdict carries an availability field that honestly reports whether data was live, sample, or missing.

candidate_id.description: Identifier for the candidate generation being evaluated.

gates.description: Exactly three gate verdicts: D002 (holdout), D003 (stability), D004 (regression).

promotion_ready.description: True only when ALL gates have status 'passed'. False if any gate is 'failed', 'unavailable', or 'not_executed'.

honesty_notice.description: Human-readable notice about which gates used live data, sample data, or had no data at all.

meta.description: Optional metadata for sample/fixture reports. Not present in live promotion reports.

source_artifacts.description: Paths to the versioned curriculum fixtures this report was derived from.

status.description: passed = gate cleared. failed = data was evaluated and did not clear. unavailable = required data was not provided. not_executed = gate logic exists but was never invoked.

availability.description: live = data from actual execution. sample = illustrative fixture (example_only). missing = not provided.
